Like to get more granular, we split our engagements up into two phases.
The first phase is this eight week strategy sprint.
And what's nice about the first phase is that it's not just strategy.
We'll probably publish five to 10 articles by the end of the eight weeks.
About halfway through, we're getting to a place where we're publishing.
And then phase two is a 12-month growth execution where we would look to try to stage and publish daily.
But, you know, for more like technical clients, there is typically a longer review process.
So I would say that it's probably closer to three articles per week that we're getting to.
a of So I think lot people.
